newsSince: No new material news since June 9. The April $2.2B capital plan ($1.5B underwritten entitlement offer + $700M hybrid expansion), the record 250MW Western Sydney S4 contracting event (pro forma contracted utilisation to 667MW), and the CDPQ $1.7B hybrid commitment were all already captured. No new ASX-material filings since.

sources.label: NEXTDC FY26 capex lift to A$2.7B (The Tech Capital)

verdicts.rankRationale: Physical-deployment bottleneck already captured June 9 (667MW contracted, capex raise). No new ASX filings or material news since; demand-driven capex (FY27 ~A$5B) supports the thesis but is priced. The -8% drift is noise. Hold rank 35.
verdicts.bull: Demand-driven capex and record contracted utilisation prove scarce AU data-center deployment capacity.
verdicts.neutral: Strong build pipeline but well-flagged; equity raise dilution offsets.
verdicts.bear: Heavy capex and equity issuance; deployment-execution and funding risk.
